docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO YUKI, YOSHIDA RETURNED MOVED LEFT NO FORWARDING ADDRESS.
CONTINUED TO 6/14/96, BOTH PARTIES TO SUBMIT ADDITIONAL INFORMATION BY MAIL, WITH SERVICE TO EACH OTHER. NO APPEARANCE REQUIRED UNLESS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY UMEZAWA, EIJI AS TO DEFENDANT YOSHIDA, YUKI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY YOSHIDA, YUKI AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT UMEZAWA, EIJI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT YOSHIDA, YUKI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT UMEZAWA, EIJI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF UMEZAWA, EIJI HEARING SET FOR NOV-29-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
COURT AMENDS THE 10/12/95 JUDGMENT TO REFLCT THAT POSSESSION OF THE 1986 HONDA IS AWARDED TO PLFT. UMEZAWA.ALL OTHER ASPECTS OF JUDMT REMAIN THE SAME

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UMEZAWA, EIJI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YOSHIDA, YUKI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF NOV-29-1995, GRANTED
